title: What this enables
summary: Deck authors get one local loop for structured editing, candidate review, validated export, and archived output.

bullets.title: Author with context
bullets.body: Keep objective, tone, constraints, slide intent, and current content together.

bullets.title: Compare before apply
bullets.body: Generate candidates, inspect differences, and promote only the chosen version.

bullets.title: Ship with guardrails
bullets.body: Validate DOM layout, text, media behavior, and render drift before archiving.

resources.title: Runtime path
resources.body: slide JSON, DOM renderer, PDF export, gate
